steps.title: Translate percentages into equations
steps.content:
Start by converting the given percentages into mathematical expressions.

44% of $ h $ equals 62% of $ j $: $$0.44h = 0.62j$$
$ j $ is equivalent to 22% of $ k $: $$j = 0.22k$$

steps.title: Substitute $ j $ into the first equation
steps.content: Replace $ j $ in the first equation with $ 0.22k $: $$0.44h = 0.62 \cdot 0.22k$$ Simplify the right-hand side: $$0.62 \cdot 0.22 = 0.1364$$ So, $$0.44h = 0.1364k$$

steps.title: Solve for $ h $ in terms of $ k $
steps.content: Divide both sides of the equation by 0.44 to isolate $ h $: $$h = rac{0.1364}{0.44}k$$ Calculate the division: $$0.1364 \div 0.44 = 0.31$$ Therefore, $$h = 0.31k$$ To express this as a percentage of $ k $, multiply by 100: $$0.31 imes 100 = 31\%$$ That matches the derived value, choice B is correct.
